excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that copy-output repair is equivalent to free learned value generation
a claim that output-path capacity evidence is positional-method promotion evidence
supported: A no-credential two-block copy-output capacity audit over the support-complete row family.
Evidence about whether replacing learned vocab softmax with copied prefix-token mass repairs train capacity.

decision.claim_boundary: Copy output establishes train capacity but does not generalize all retrieval lanes.

model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, positional scale
model.value_output_mode: copied prefix-token mass from learned second-block attention, no vocab softmax projection
